  Summary: File exists and is actively maintained.

  Summary: Confirmed Next.js + Tailwind + TypeScript + GSAP + Framer Motion with premium dark visual direction and required sections.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Next.js App Router project scaffolded in current workspace root using TypeScript and Tailwind.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented premium portfolio layout, animated hero, projects cards, dynamic case studies, about, and contact sections.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions were required by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies, lint passed, and production build passed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran a development task using npm run dev.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Summary: Debug launch not initiated because debug mode confirmation from the user is pending.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README updated with project details and this file cleaned to remove HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
